CheckTitle: Ensure all agent identities and blueprints have owners or sponsors
Description: Checks that every agent identity and agent identity blueprint has at least one owner or sponsor assigned. Sponsors are required during blueprint creation but may be removed afterward.
Risk: Agent identities without owners or sponsors have no accountable party for their permissions, lifecycle, and security posture. Orphaned agents are invisible to governance processes.

Remediation.Recommendation: Assign at least one owner and one sponsor to the agent identity via POST /agentIdentities/{id}/owners and POST /agentIdentities/{id}/sponsors.

SourceNotes: Sponsors are a governance concept specific to Entra Agent ID.
